scenarios.title: Duplicate code with different meanings
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-design-principles-review. Scenario: Duplicate code with different meanings. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected no DRY refactor.

scenarios.title: Speculative event bus with one in-process caller
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-design-principles-review. Scenario: Speculative event bus with one in-process caller. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected YAGNI/speculative abstraction finding.

scenarios.title: Tell Don't Ask violation on domain entity
scenarios.expected: Expected finding suggesting logic moves closer to the data it modifies.

scenarios.title: Agent complains about Tell Don't Ask on a pure DTO
scenarios.expected: Expected false-positive rejection; DTOs are meant to be asked.
